title: VimFu — gi Insert at Last Position
description: gi jumps to the last place you were inserting text and puts you back in insert mode. Resume editing exactly where you left off.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

setup.content:
# Recipe Builder
ingredients = [
    "flour",
    "sugar",
]

def bake():
    print("mixing...")

steps.say: G I jumps to where you last inserted text and enters insert mode. It remembers your last edit point.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: insert, move away, come back ---

steps.say: Add an item to the list. Go to line four, open a new line below.
Good. Now go look at the bake function.
Now I want to go back and add more ingredients. G I.
Cursor jumped right back to where I was typing. In insert mode. Type more.
Seamless. No searching for where you were.
G I. Return to your last insert position in insert mode. Great for when you leave to check something and come right back.
